verbGlossary.INITIATES: {source} creation opens a new {target} or lifecycle instance
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS: {source} designates a responsible party vi{target} or delegation
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHES: {source} sets a deadline, due date, or time constraint on {target}
verbGlossary.FOLLOWS: {source} moves through a defined {target} pattern from start to finish
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source} event causes {target} status change such as overdue or hold
verbGlossary.RESOLVES: {source} response satisfies the open item and advances it to closed
verbGlossary.RECORDS: {source} captures {target} response or decision for the project record
verbGlossary.ADVANCES TO: {source} progresses forward to the next {target} in its lifecycle
verbGlossary.ROUTES THROUGH: {source} passes through {target} chain or signature sequence
verbGlossary.APPROVES TO: Review document grants {target} and moves item to an approved status
verbGlossary.REJECTS TO: Review document denies {target} and moves item to a rejected status
verbGlossary.RETURNS TO: Review document sends item back for revision and resubmission

verbGlossary.ORIGINATES IN: {source} begins its lifecycle in a preliminary or draft {target}
verbGlossary.FINALIZES AT: {source} reaches its terminal approved state after completing all review steps
verbGlossary.REQUIRES: {source} mandates a specific {target} action such as signature or approval before proceeding
verbGlossary.CLOSES AT: {source} reaches its completed and closed status in {target}
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source} provides visual or written evidence of a field disposition or {target}
verbGlossary.MAPS TO: {source} template or line item corresponds to a specific {target}
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source}measure trends in relation to {target} performance metric
verbGlossary.AWAITS AT: {source} is parked in {target} waiting for an external action or condition
verbGlossary.DISPOSITIONS TO: {source} receives a field inspection {target} of conforming or deficient
verbGlossary.VOIDS AT: {source} is formally cancelled and assigned a void {target}
verbGlossary.ROUTES VIA: {source} is forwarded through a delegation {target} to the assigned party
